_meta.adr: ADR-037 modular manifest fragment — never edit src/manifest.json
_meta.description: People group cards-collapse (ADR-044): GroupPeople becomes a direct link to the PeopleCards landing page. The four former child leaves (LearnerProfilesMenu, Enrolments, Attendance, Credentials) are removed from the menu via menu-layout.json#removals; their pages remain routable via original routes.
